name: Avalara AvaTax
description: Tax compliance and calculation API with international coverage. Calculate sales tax, manage transactions, validate addresses, handle exemption certificates, and automate tax filing.

capabilities.name: utilities_ping
capabilities.description: Test API connectivity and authentication.

capabilities.name: transactions_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tax transaction and calculate tax for sales, purchases, or returns.

capabilities.name: transactions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single transaction by company code and transaction code.

capabilities.name: transactions_list
capabilities.description: List transactions for a company with filters.

capabilities.name: transactions_commit
capabilities.description: Commit a transaction, marking it as finalized.

capabilities.name: transactions_void
capabilities.description: Void an existing transaction.

capabilities.name: transactions_adjust
capabilities.description: Replace a transaction with corrected data.

capabilities.name: transactions_refund
capabilities.description: Create a refund for an existing transaction.

capabilities.name: transactions_audit
capabilities.description: Retrieve audit information for a transaction.

capabilities.name: addresses_resolve
capabilities.description: Validate and resolve an address with latitude/longitude coordinates.

capabilities.name: companies_list
capabilities.description: List all companies visible to the current user.

capabilities.name: companies_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a company by ID.

capabilities.name: companies_create
capabilities.description: Create a new company.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create one or more customer records for a company.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List customers for a company.

capabilities.name: certificates_create
capabilities.description: Create tax exemption certificates for a company.

capabilities.name: certificates_list
capabilities.description: List exemption certificates for a company.

capabilities.name: nexus_list
capabilities.description: List nexus declarations for a company.

capabilities.name: nexus_create
capabilities.description: Create nexus declarations for a company.

capabilities.name: tax_codes_list
capabilities.description: List available tax codes.

capabilities.name: tax_rates_by_address
capabilities.description: Get tax rates for a specific address without creating a transaction.

capabilities.name: tax_rates_by_postal_code
capabilities.description: Get tax rates by postal code.
